tasks.question: I keep your money safe. You can save coins or take cash from me. What place am I?
People come here when they feel very sick. Doctors and nurses work here day and night. What place is it?
You can watch a big film on a giant screen. People buy popcorn and sit in the dark. Where are you?
Many players run on the field. Thousands of fans watch and cheer. What place is it?
You can sleep here when you travel. You can rent a room for the night. What place is this?
You come here to read and borrow books. It is usually very quiet inside. What place is it?
You can see old things, art, and history here. People walk slowly and look at the exhibits. What place am I?
Trees, grass, and a small pond are here. People walk, relax, and play outside. What place is it?
You come here when you are hungry. A waiter brings you food and drinks. What place is this?
You can buy many different things here: toys, clothes, or gifts. People come here to go shopping. What place is it?
You can buy food, fruit, vegetables, and milk here. People push shopping carts inside. What place is it?
You can drink coffee or tea here. You can also eat cake or a sandwich. What place is it?
